title: Finorza
description: A Minecraft mod for simulating autonomous agents.
body:
Finorza creates a gRPC server which allows an agent to observe & act on the player's behalf. It's a faster, cleaner, and more customizable alternative to [MineRL](https://github.com/minerllabs/minerl), though more geared towards inference/evaluation than training.

## Requirements
- **Minecraft** 1.16.5 w/ [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net)
- [**Fabric API** v0.42](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.42.0+1.16)
- [**Cloth Config** v4.17](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/4.17.101)
- [**Mod Menu** v1.16](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/1.16.23)

Also verified to run with Sodium, Lithium, and LazyDFU. Most other optimization mods should work.
